ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sediment_cores" (
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sediment core */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the core was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the core was collected */,
  "depth_range" TEXT /* Depth range of the core (e.g., 0-100 cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the core including specifics about the sample */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site where the core was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site where the core was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sediment core */,
  "core_length" REAL /* Length of the sediment core */,
  "core_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the sediment core */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paleo_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sediment core from which this data is derived */,
  "depth_cm" REAL /* Depth of the measurement in centimeters */,
  "age_bp" REAL /* Age of the sediment in years before present */,
  "temperature_degC" REAL /* Temperature measurement in degrees Celsius */,
  "uncertainty_temp" REAL /* Uncertainty in temperature measurement */,
  "uncertainty_age" REAL /* Uncertainty in age measurement */,
  "reliable" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the data is reliable (Y/N) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sample from which the measurement was taken */,
  "calibration_info" TEXT /* Calibration information related to the measurement */,
  "analytical_method" TEXT /* Analytical method used to obtain the measurement */,
  "measurement_uncertainty_type" TEXT /* Type of uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paleo_data_core_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_id") REFERENCES sediment_cores ("core_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the researcher in charge of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., river delta, coastal marsh) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "researcher_affiliation" TEXT /* Researcher's affiliation (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the paleo data entry */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., degrees Celsius, pH) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., degrees Celsius, pH) */,
  "measurement_precision" REAL /* Precision of the measurement */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES paleo_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality review entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the paleo data entry being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., verified, needs review) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the quality assessment */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the person who performed the quality review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the quality review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES paleo_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paleo data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES paleo_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the paleo data entry being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update for this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES paleo_data ("data_id")
)
